welcomeSubtitle: Let's get you set up real quick.

language.title: Language
language.description: Pick the language for atelier. You can change this later in Settings.

mode.title: How do you want to use atelier?
mode.description: Pick a mode now — you can switch any time in Settings.

solo.title: Solo — fully local
solo.description: Build clothing packs on your own machine. No account, no server — works completely offline.

cloud.title: Team — with the cloud
cloud.description: Sign in with Discord to sync packs and build together with your team.

server.title: Server address
server.description: Address of the atelier-api (sync server). Check that an atelier-api responds there.

gta.title: GTA V directory
gta.description: For the ped preview and the pack export. You can also do this later in Settings.
gta.pathSavedUnverified: Path saved, but not verified — does the folder contain GTA5.exe and .rpf archives?

logs.title: Real-time logs
logs.description: A dedicated window with live logs (app, sidecar, UI) — handy when reporting bugs. Anytime via Ctrl+Shift+L.
